derived_features.reduce_tile_policy_effect: split K/reduction tile; lower L1 pressure with extra loop overhead
derived_features.source_input_policy: Python/Triton source is not parsed in V2.7; this plan is derived from MLIR plus optional DES/trace JSON evidence.

conventional_tensor_signature.note: name-based conventional tensor signature; used as evidence only, not a hard-coded kernel family

legality.capacity_rule: maxLive_S(T,M,P) <= Cap_S checked by estimated_max_live including per-buffer nbuf_b extra copies
legality.per_buffer_multiplier_rule: for each eligible local buffer b, nbuf_b in {1,2}; illegal combinations are rejected by maxLive_S gate

legality.reason: estimated from cube/vector op sequence; real CVPipelining dry-run required for authoritative separability
estimated demo cannot prove GraphSyncSolver deadlock-free; requires real sync_plan sidecar

meta.note: Input-aware analytical estimate recovered from visible IR features; not measured hardware time.

reason: Layered search selected this StrategyConfig after L1 tiling/fusion pruning, L2 overlap allocation, and L3 refinement.
m=double_buffer enables the document-3 overlap model: serial load+compute+store moves toward max(load, compute, store).
s=2 models CV soft-pipeline overlap; r=1:1 balances Cube/Vector chunks.
y=graph_sync_solver uses a lower analytical sync-cost proxy than keep_existing/inject-style sync.
PlanMemory-style estimated maxLive_UB=93.28 KB within 256.00 KB capacity.
